scenes.narration: What really makes an AI agent work? It is not only the model itself.

visual.title: The Agent Harness
visual.subtitle: What turns a model into an agent

scenes.narration: Meet the harness. It is the system built around the language model.

visual.support: the system wrapped around the model

scenes.narration: The harness wraps around the model. It plugs in a set of tools. It adds long-term memory. And a place to act, the environment.
First, perceive the current state. Then decide the next move. Act by calling a tool. Finally, observe what changed.
A bare model only predicts text. A harness lets it call real tools. It also keeps memory and handles errors.
So the agent is not the model alone. The harness is what makes it an agent.

visual.support: the model is just one part of the system

scenes.narration: Want smarter agents? Build a better harness. Follow for more.
